name: Boursin (Herbed Cheese Spread)
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly cream the butter and cream cheese in an electric mixer until smooth.
2. Add the spices (oregano, dill, freshly ground pepper, garlic powder, and marjoram) to the mixture and continue beating until well combined.
3. Transfer the spread to a small bowl.
4. Cover with plastic wrap.
5. Allow the mixture to mellow overnight in the refrigerator before using, if possible.
6. Serve with crackers.
Note: Use as a seasoning when cooking vegetables. Place a heaping teaspoon on top of tomato halves. Broil along with steak or chops for a different vegetable dish.
